question: On what date was the BZBA hearing on docket VAR-2026-019 held?
On what date were the draft minutes DM-2026-0326 adopted by the Board?
What is the current status of the variance application VAR-2026-019 per the packet's status register?
Under the operative correction notices, is appeal AP-2026-005 timely or untimely?
reference_answer: Timely. Confirmed by CORR-BZBA-2026-002 and re-affirmed by CORR-BZBA-2026-003.

question: On what date was Notice of Appeal AP-2026-005 filed?
Under the corrected appeal window, on what date did the appeal period close?
reference_answer: April 25, 2026 (thirty days from the March 26, 2026 decision).

question: After CORR-BZBA-2026-001 was issued, was Alternate Castelletti's vote counted in the official record?
reference_answer: No. His vote was voided by CORR-BZBA-2026-001.

question: On what date was the first correction notice CORR-BZBA-2026-001 issued?
What was the vote tally as originally recorded in draft minutes DM-2026-0326 before any correction?
reference_answer: 4 in favor (Persaud, Klessig, Vong, Castelletti), 1 against (Halvorsen), 1 recused (Bromberg). Tally 4–1, motion carried.

question: What is the corrected vote tally on the motion to approve VAR-2026-019 after CORR-BZBA-2026-001?
reference_answer: 3 in favor (Persaud, Klessig, Vong), 1 against (Halvorsen), 1 recused (Bromberg), Castelletti's vote voided. Tally 3–1, motion carried.

question: How many members are required to constitute a quorum under BZBA Rules of Procedure §2.3?
How many regular board members participated in the corrected vote on VAR-2026-019?
reference_answer: Four regular members (Persaud, Klessig, Vong, Halvorsen). Quorum maintained.

question: Which board member voted against the motion to approve VAR-2026-019?
Which board member recused himself from docket VAR-2026-019?
What reason did Vice Chair Bromberg give for his recusal from VAR-2026-019?
reference_answer: A pre-existing engineering services contract between his consulting firm, Bromberg Civil Associates, and the applicant Quintrell Holdings LLC, executed in 2024 for unrelated work.

question: Was Alternate Castelletti present at the March 26, 2026 hearing?
Which public objector resides at the property directly abutting 88 Heron Ridge Road?
What specific concern did Carwyn Tjelmeland raise on behalf of the Heron Ridge Neighborhood Association?
reference_answer: That the variance would set an undesirable precedent for other lots on the road; requested a written non-precedent finding as a condition.

question: What recommendation did Town Planner Suniti Aravamudan make regarding VAR-2026-019?
Who co-signed Staff Report SR-VAR-2026-019 with the Town Planner?
To which portion of the variance application did Yusra Penhollow object?
reference_answer: The lot-coverage exceedance only; she did not object to the setback portion.

question: Which public commenter cited prior variances on Beech Court and Tamarack Lane in support of the application?
What primary concern did Beulah Mainwaring state in her objection?
reference_answer: A 'wall effect' along the shared property line and impaired natural drainage during spring runoff.

question: Who is the Building Inspector named in the staff report?
What did the Clerk's initial informal communication on April 22, 2026 say about the timeliness of Ms. Mainwaring's appeal?
reference_answer: That the appeal was untimely because the twenty-day appeal window from the March 26 decision had closed on April 15, 2026.

question: What did CORR-BZBA-2026-002 change about the Clerk's earlier position on the appeal window?
reference_answer: It corrected the appeal window to thirty days under BZBA Bylaws §6.2 (adopted October 2017), making the April 21 appeal timely.

question: Following CORR-BZBA-2026-001, what is the operative vote tally of record on VAR-2026-019?
reference_answer: 3 in favor, 1 against, 1 recused. Motion carried 3–1.

question: For what procedural reason was Alternate Castelletti's vote voided?
reference_answer: BZBA Rules of Procedure §2.4(c) requires that an alternate's seating be made by motion of the Chair reflected in the minutes; that motion was not made at the point of the substantive vote.

question: What is the current applicable appeal window length for BZBA matters under the operative correction record?
Is the variance VAR-2026-019 currently in effect, suspended, or denied?
reference_answer: In effect; approved with conditions, pending appeal.

question: What state statute is referenced in CORR-BZBA-2026-002 as the source of the appeal-window rule?
What is the source of the thirty-day appeal window applied to AP-2026-005?
What is the packet identifier for this BZBA hearing packet?
What is the docket number assigned to the Quintrell Holdings LLC variance application?
Who issued correction notice CORR-BZBA-2026-003?
In which packet section are the draft minutes' motion and vote text recorded?
reference_answer: §6, Motion and Vote (in DM-2026-0326 as recorded April 1, 2026).

question: In which packet document is the staff approval recommendation documented?
Who is identified as Town Counsel in the packet?
Who is identified as the Town Clerk in the packet?
What type of document is BZBA-PKT-2026-0411?
reference_answer: A BZBA hearing packet compiled by the Office of the Town Clerk, Town of Brassfield, NH.
